ncaa.title: SEC Now crew deliver their takeaways from Lane Kiffin's presser

ncaa.description: Kiffin takes the podium at the 2026 SEC Football Kickoff to discuss problems facing college football and how he is navigating his first year in Baton Rouge.

ncaa.title: Tom Osborne becomes 1st living inductee in Nebraska's state HOF
ncaa.description: College football coaching great Tom Osborne became the first living person to be named to the Nebraska state hall of fame.

ncaa.title: Tennessee beats out Ohio State for prized RB Gabriel Georges
ncaa.description: David Gabriel Georges, ESPN's No. 2 running back and No. 14 overall prospect in 2027, announced his pledge to Tennessee over Ohio State on Wednesday night, ending a contentious, monthslong recruiting battle.

ncaa.title: Texas A&M LB Daymion Sanford expected back early from injury
ncaa.description: Texas A&M linebacker Daymion Sanford will be ready earlier than expected after a gruesome leg injury suffered in the spring.

ncaa.title: Pete Golding, Jon Sumrall among top quips from SEC media days
ncaa.description: In the spirit of "winning the news conference," we singled out the best lines from some of the coaches' time in Tampa.

ncaa.title: How every 2027 five-star college football prospect will fit
ncaa.description: There are 23 five-star players in the class, and we scout each one's game for the next level.

ncaa.title: Daymion Sanford says he's excited to welcome his brother to Aggies squad
ncaa.description: Sanford reflects on being named captain for Texas A&M as he speaks on what it'll be like to have his little brother as not only a teammate but also a roommate.

ncaa.title: Mike Elko details what Texas A&M is trying to accomplish
ncaa.description: Elko tells Paul Finebaum about how he's building the Aggies' mental toughness in fall camp in order to help them reach their goals this season.

ncaa.title: Chizik, Harper critique Bama's DeBoer at 2026 SEC Media Days
ncaa.description: SEC Network's Gene Chizik and Roman Harper join The Paul Finebaum Show and give their opinions on how Kalen DeBoer should've approached the SEC Football Kickoff.

ncaa.title: Ole Miss' Golding on LSU's Kiffin: 'Lane and I are great'
ncaa.description: Ole Miss coach Pete Golding didn't hold back in his first appearance at SEC media days Wednesday, saying his relationship with LSU coach Lane Kiffin is good while defending his program against tampering allegations by Clemson coach Dabo Swinney.

ncaa.title: Ole Miss' Pete Golding explains defensive strategy, previews revenge game
ncaa.description: Golding dives into how his defensive philosophy has changed and describes what he looks for in transfers before previewing the matchup against his former boss, Lane Kiffin and his LSU Tigers.

ncaa.title: Takeaways from Day 3 of SEC Football Media Days
ncaa.description: The SEC Now crew gives insight on what they remember the most from SEC Media Days so far as they spotlight the intensity from the newer head coaches in the conference.

ncaa.title: Aggies' Marcel Reed lists changes he's made to stay Heisman hopeful
ncaa.description: Reed, known as "Gingerbread Man," touches on improving his throwing mechanics this offseason and explains his relationship with Texas A&M's receivers, including his childhood friend Mario Craver.

ncaa.title: Mike Elko details Texas A&M's values, looks to build on last year's success
ncaa.description: Elko touches on the captain vote for the Aggies, highlighting the work of his athletes on and off the field in the communities before addressing the motivation to improve from last year.

ncaa.title: Vernell Brown III expresses what it means to represent Florida
ncaa.description: Brown III joins SEC Network's Dari Nowkhah to speak on the energy of the Gators' program as they look to get back to being a perennial championship contender.

ncaa.title: Alabama needs collective team effort to improve rushing attack
ncaa.description: SEC Now analysts Benjamin Watson, Gene Chizik and Jordan Rodgers debate exactly what the Crimson Tide must do to turn around last year's anemic ground game.

ncaa.title: Jon Sumrall says Florida QB doesn't 'need to be Tim Tebow'
ncaa.description: Jon Sumrall said that whether Florida's starting QB is Aaron Philo or Tramell Jones Jr., neither of them "need to be Tim Tebow."

ncaa.title: Kirk Herbstreit: Potential SEC breakaway is 'just talk'
ncaa.description: Kirk Herbstreit: Potential SEC breakaway is 'just talk'

ncaa.title: Ole Miss' QB Trinidad Chambliss: 'We went far, but we're hungry for more'
ncaa.description: Chambliss explains adjusting to the Rebels' new offensive coordinator and lists what he spent the offseason improving on after learning he will have one final go at a CFP title.

ncaa.title: Bama's Ryan Coleman-Williams speaks on overcoming adversity
ncaa.description: Coleman-Williams gets marriage advice from Nick Saban and Roman Harper while describing what he and the Crimson Tide look to take away from fall camp.

ncaa.title: Golding: Rebels' retention brings stability in Year 1 as head coach
ncaa.description: Golding shouts out his staff as he boasts being able to maintain stability with returning faces and commends players on the way they've adapted to new changes and expectations.

ncaa.title: Debating the top running back rooms in the SEC
ncaa.description: SEC Now's Gene Chizik, Jordan Rodgers and Benjamin Watson dive into the backfields of the SEC, ranking their top schools based on the depth and skills from their running backs.

ncaa.title: Jon Sumrall describes 'player-driven' approach at Florida
ncaa.description: Sumrall promises to "work tirelessly" for his players in his first year as coach of the Gators, asking only that they give him the same in return.

ncaa.title: Jadan Baugh describes decision to stay with Florida
ncaa.description: Baugh joins SEC Network's Dari Nowkhah and explains the reason to stay in Gainesville after last season, sparking the question, "Why not be a Gator?"

ncaa.title: Diving into Mike Elko's latest additions to the improved Texas A&M program
ncaa.description: The SEC Now crew discuss the new additions to the Aggies' coaching staff as they commend Elko on his ability to develop his players to their fullest potential.

ncaa.title: Alabama's DeBoer says QB competition will be 'tough decision'
ncaa.description: Alabama coach Kalen DeBoer said the starting quarterback competition between Keelon Russell and Austin Mack will lead to a 'tough decision.'

ncaa.title: Football legend Nick Saban gives his thoughts on nine-game SEC schedule
ncaa.description: Alabama's historic Coach Saban states he's always been in support of a nine-game conference schedule, laying out reasons why it is beneficial while also providing advice on how to improve it.

ncaa.title: Analyzing Ole Miss' potential ahead of Pete Golding's first full year
ncaa.description: The SEC Now crew details how the dynamic abilities of Kewan Lacy along with Golding's improved play calling could help the Rebels continue their success this season.

ncaa.title: Commish: SEC focus on making system better, new legislation
ncaa.description: Commissioner Greg Sankey clarified Wednesday that while "frustrations are real," the SEC is focused not on breaking away from the NCAA but to "make the system better."

ncaa.title: Saban: Sumrall's mindset, hiring choices are green flags for Florida
ncaa.description: Nick Saban credits Jon Sumrall for his eagerness since being named the Gators' head coach and praises the strong staff he has assembled in Gainesville.

ncaa.title: Bama's Bray Hubbard describes how college career has turned out
ncaa.description: Entering his senior year as one of the key Crimson Tide pieces, Hubbard tells SEC Network's Dari Nowkhah about his journey to Tuscaloosa and buying into the program.

ncaa.title: Nick Saban lists the toughest SEC QBs to game plan for
ncaa.description: Saban joins SEC Now and names the quarterbacks that he would hate to game plan against, highlighting some big name returners and impact transfers.

ncaa.title: Will Lane Kiffin's return to Oxford be the biggest game of the year?
ncaa.description: Nick Saban and the SEC Now crew preview the most anticipated matchup in the conference, debating what the Tigers must do to weather the storm against the Rebels.

ncaa.title: Zabien Brown on Bama: 'We know what we bring to the table'
ncaa.description: Brown compares the competitive nature of practices and actual games as he discusses how the tight relationship between the Crimson Tide players makes it easy to strategize plays.

ncaa.title: Nick Saban on 6-year-old grandson: 'He's got all the right stuff'
ncaa.description: College football legend Saban breaks down the film on his six-year-old grandson playing catch in Tuscaloosa as the coaching icon gives the full scouting report.

ncaa.title: McGee Essay: Depicting LSU's Lane Kiffin return to Ole Miss
ncaa.description: As Kiffin prepares to travel back to Oxford, SEC Network's Ryan McGee uses past coaching returns to give insight on how the Sept. 19 matchup between the Tigers and Rebels may turn out.

ncaa.title: Peter Burns asks his five burning questions around the SEC
ncaa.description: SEC Network's Burns proposes his biggest question marks in the SEC including territory battles, new coaches, transfers and if powerhouses can return to their former glory.

ncaa.description: Roman Harper and Dusty Dvoracek analyze the strengths of both Austin Mack and Keelon Russell as Nick Saban describes what goes into selecting a starting QB.
